name: A Basic Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 frozen deep dish pie crust, 9-inch size
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C) and preheat a cookie sheet at the same time.
2. Place the pie crust on the preheated cookie sheet.
3. Pour the pumpkin filling into the crust.
4. Put the pie in the oven and bake for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake an additional 40-50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool completely.
